scope.shape: standard (meta + entries/messages/list sections; literal titles; one keeps a file-local omitEvidenceArrays helper passed as entries)

censusCorrection.summary: The v2142 closeout claimed the 'pure-standard with tests' subset was empty and that all remaining unmigrated renderers carried for-loops/h3/map/flatMap. The shape buckets were correct, but the with-tests/without-tests split used a flawed test-detection that only matched test files importing the '...Renderer.ts' module directly. This repo's report tests import the stable-entry barrel (e.g. '...PreflightReview.js', which re-exports both loadXxx and renderXxxMarkdown) and do not import the Renderer module, so barrel-only-tested renderers were misclassified as testless.
censusCorrection.evidence: All three renderers migrated this batch already had mature tests (PreflightReview 262 lines, HandleUpstreamEcho 341 lines, ApprovalRequired 291 lines); the deferred MinimalShardReadinessLiveReadGate has a 367-line test. So at v2142 the subset was NOT empty — it held at least these 4.
censusCorrection.correctedDetection: hasTest = any test file references the barrel/report stem (renderer basename minus the 'Renderer' suffix), not just the Renderer basename.

pureStandardWithTestsRemaining: managedAuditManualSandboxConnectionCredentialResolverMinimalShardReadinessLiveReadGateRenderer.ts (async loader; uses lines-section renderLiveRead; deferred to v2144)

focusedRendererBatch.command: npx vitest run <3 existing report tests> test/governanceGrowthRatchet.test.ts

byteIdentical.method: The existing tests assert Markdown via toContain (not full-string), so a throwaway harness rendered each report before and after the edit and diffed them. The only difference in all three was the runtime '- Generated at:' timestamp line (the omitEvidenceArrays output and all sections were byte-identical). Harness and .tmp dumps deleted before commit.

archiveDeliverables.codeWalkthrough: 代码讲解记录_生产雏形阶段3/r2000/2114-renderer-consolidation-batch-26-v2143.md

crossProjectParallel.reason: v2143 changes only Node Markdown renderer internals and archive documentation.
